name: Barb's Best Gazpacho
recipeIngredient: 2 medium English cucumbers, peeled and cut into 1-inch pieces
1 large Spanish or red onion, cored and seeded
1 large green bell pepper, cored, seeded, and ribbed
1 large red bell pepper, cored, seeded, and deribbed
2 cups tomato juice or vegetable juice cocktail
recipeInstructions:
6 Servings
Core the 5 medium tomatoes and coarsely chop them.
Whiz the garlic in a blender or food processor. Add the tomatoes and puree until smooth. Strain into a large non-reactive bowl.
Coarsely chop 1 of the cucumbers, 1/2 of the onion, and 1/2 of the green and red bell peppers. Add to the processor (if using a blender, add 1/2 cup of tomato or vegetable juice). Process until liquified; strain into the bowl, pressing down with the back of a spoon to extract all liquid.
Add remaining juice, olive oil, red wine vinegar, vodka or vermouth if using, lime juice, Worcestershire sauce, Tabasco, cayenne pepper, celery salt, and pepper. Stir well. Cover and refrigerate for 4 hours or overnight.
Finely dice the Roma tomatoes, remaining 1/2 onion, 1/2 green and red peppers, and 1 cucumber. Add finely diced celery. Refrigerate in a small mixing bowl.
To serve, ladle soup into chilled individual bowls. Sprinkle with chopped vegetables and croutons if using.
